summary: High‑quality audience recording of a stellar Dead show with an especially strong second set.
review: Fans rave about this performance, calling the set list amazing and the second set very good. The tape is praised for its clear, better‑than‑other audience sound, though a few note it isn’t flawless. Overall the concert and its capture are viewed as highly enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: All six reviews are positive, with an average user rating of ~4.7; both the musical performance and recording quality are described as strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Great sound overall—clearer than other audience copies, high‑quality for a free‑show style tape; not quite perfect but solid and listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is praised for its energetic vibe and an especially strong second set; fans describe the set list as amazing with no noted weak spots.
